Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.game

Class GameSession

java.lang.Object
com.example.battleship.game.GameSession
public final class GameSession extends Object
Singleton class managing global game sessions and persistence operations in Battleship.

Responsible for creating new game instances, loading and saving active match states, managing persistent file paths, and ensuring a single active game session across scenes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearSavedGame()
    Deletes existing save and summary files from disk upon game completion or reset.
    GameManager

    Gets the current active game manager instance.

    Gets the current human player instance from active game manager.

    Ensures an active game manager instance exists, creating a new default one if necessary.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static GameSession getInstance()
      Retrieves the thread-safe singleton instance of GameSession.
      Returns:
      The global GameSession instance.

    • getCurrentGameManager

      public GameManager getCurrentGameManager()
      Gets the current active game manager instance.
      Returns:
      The active GameManager, or null if no session is active.

    • getSaveFile

      public Path getSaveFile()
      Gets the file path location for binary match saves.
      Returns:
      The Path to the main save file.

    • getSummaryFile

      public Path getSummaryFile()
      Gets the file path location for summary match text files.
      Returns:
      The Path to the summary save file.

    • hasSavedGame

      public boolean hasSavedGame()
      Checks if a valid binary save file exists on disk.
      Returns:
      true if the save file exists; false otherwise.

    • startNewGame

      public void startNewGame(String nickname)
      Initializes a new match session with the given nickname.

      Defaults player nickname to "Player1" if blank or null, instantiates a new GameManager, and automatically triggers fleet placement for the AI.

      Parameters:
      nickname - Player's preferred display nickname.

    • loadLatestSave

      public boolean loadLatestSave()
      Attempts to deserialize and load the latest save file from disk.
      Returns:
      true if match data was loaded successfully; false otherwise.

    • saveCurrentGame

      public void saveCurrentGame()
      Persists the current game session state and summary to disk.

    • clearSavedGame

      public void clearSavedGame()
      Deletes existing save and summary files from disk upon game completion or reset.

    • getHumanPlayer

      public HumanPlayer getHumanPlayer()
      Gets the current human player instance from active game manager.
      Returns:
      The HumanPlayer reference, or null if no manager is active.

    • requireGameManager

      public GameManager requireGameManager()
      Ensures an active game manager instance exists, creating a new default one if necessary.
      Returns:
      A non-null GameManager instance.
